rulings.Case Title: EMELIE B SANTANA VS. BANK OF AMERICA HOME LOANS et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, March 18, 2013, line 1. DEFENDANTS MORTGAGE ELECTRONIC REGISTRATION SYSTEMS, INC., COUNTRYWIDE HOME LOANS, INC., BANK OF AMERICA, N.A., AND THE BANK OF NEW YORK's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT Continued to April 18, 2013. Opposing party to comply with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6B and provide courtesy copy of opposition with over letter reflecting new hearing date no later than April 5, 2013. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SBERLO FAMILY TRUST VS. TANYA PHILLIPS (3/19/12-AMENDED TO CONTRACT ACTION)
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Attorney'S Fees And Costs
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, March 18, 2013, line 2. PLAINTIFFS SBERLO FAMILY TRUST, YOEL SBERLO AND NADINE SBERLO's Notice Of Motion For Attorney'S Fees And Costs Grant atty fees only in amount of $21,973.50. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SBERLO FAMILY TRUST VS. TANYA PHILLIPS (3/19/12-AMENDED TO CONTRACT ACTION)
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion Of Deft For Reconsideration Of Order Granting Pltf'S And X-Defts Special Motion To Strike Cross-Complaint As A S.L.A.P.P. Suit;
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, March 18, 2013, line 2. CROSS COMPLAINANT TANYA PHILLIPS' Notice Of Motion And Motion Of Deft For Reconsideration Of Order Granting Pltf'S And X-Defts Special Motion To Strike Cross-Complaint As A S.L.A.P.P. Suit Deny Motion to reconsider moving party failed to sustain burden, Court finds asserted new law, new facts are not such. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, March 18, 2013, line 3. DEFENDANT 250 KEARNY STREET, LLC's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Hearing Required. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, March 18, 2013, line 4. DEFENDANT PETE NAJID's MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT Grant failed to execute first amended complaint. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: FEDERAL NATIONAL MORTGAGE ASSOCIATION VS. ALFRED RICHARDSON et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, March 18, 2013, line 5. PLAINTIFF FEDERAL NATIONAL MORTGAGE ASSOCIATION's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Grant subject to opposition. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY VS. JULIANA HERRERA et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Motion To Vacate Default
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, March 18, 2013, line 6. DEFENDANT JOSEPH RUSSELL's Ntc Of Motion To Vacate Default Hearing Required. Moving party to provide Court with courtesy copy, failure to provide motion denied. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: NASIR PATEL VS. MARK THOMAS EDWARDS
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Dismiss Or To Stay Action; Supporting Memorandum
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, March 18, 2013, line 7. DEFENDANT MARK EDWARDS' Notice Of Motion To Dismiss Or To Stay Action; Supporting Memorandum Deny failed to sustain burden per CCP 410.30 and/or 418.10. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: BUDER TAWASHA VS. AARON PLEDGER et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Compel Further Responses To Ud Form Interrogatories, And Req. For Attorney'S Fees
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, March 18, 2013, line 8. DEFENDANT AARON PLEDGER's Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Compel Further Responses To Ud Form Interrogatories, And Req. For Attorney's Fees Continued to March 21, 2013. Moving party to comply with SF Local Rule 2.6B and provide courtesy copies of moving papers filed at 12:06pm on March 13, 2013 with cover letter reflecting new hearing date no later than March 18, 2013. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: RICHARD LEW VS. GRAEME AGATE et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Ot Mtn And Mtn To Quash Service Of Summons
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, March 18, 2013, line 9. DEFENDANT GRAEME AGATE AND ADAM CLEAR's Ntc Ot Mtn And Mtn To Quash Service Of Summons Deny, Losornio is controlling, no five day extension. In future counsel to comply with SFLR 2.6B. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CESAR MONTES VS. LOGAN LAUGHLIN et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, March 18, 2013, line 10. DEFENDANT LOGAN LAUGHLIN MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS Grant no opposition filed and no proof of service re Summons and Complaint to possibly raise presumption of service. = (501/REQ)
